title: add shell completion for podman create/run --sysctl
body:
### Feature request description

When typing the podman create/run --sysctl command it would be nice if we could get a list of the locally defined sysctl option auto completed

### Suggest potential solution

The autocompletion code is written in go, currently the flag is using no completion function here
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/021583285288c50fbe5af6561b63af5c4627fee3/cmd/podman/common/create.go#L736-L737

Add a new function in cmd/podman/common/completion.go that can list all sysctl names using the dot as separator, the list can be build by parsing /proc/sys directories for all available sysctl names on the current system.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_
